Dortmund - FC Barcelona dredges to Ousmane Dembele. Borussia Dortmund is faced with the question: Sell or hold? One threatens success, the other threatens the player.

As the last player, Ousmane Dembele strolled from the catacombs of the Westfalenstadion on Friday evening at 20.52. The 21-year-old was one of the last to get into the team bus after the team presentation. Previously he had diligently written autograms to be photographed with fans in front of the camera.

At Borussia Dortmund (almost) everything is about the shooting star. Fans, managers and possibly even Dembele himself: It could be the last common hours.

According to media reports from Frankeich and Spain, FC Barcelona is planning a major attack on the BVB striker to replace Neymar, who has moved to Paris Saint-Germain

The L'Equipe, France's largest football magazine, wrote on Friday evening, that Barcelona had intensified its efforts to dembele. The player should definitely come.

Spanish TV broadcaster Gol quoted Dembele himself as saying, "Barcelona is a great club, all players would like to play there, it's an honor to see his name on the list of players who wants Barcelona Will see what happens. "

No offer from Barca
According to SPORT1 information, no offer has yet been received at Borussia Dortmund. Neither club officers nor players consultants have contacted BVB.

Should this change, the public would know immediately: as a listed company, BVB would have to inform its shareholders of an offer from Dembele by means of an ad hoc announcement. Because it can be assumed that this is about sums that have an influence on the share price.

In the area stands a transfer of 100 million euros. According to him, Barca is even supposed to be able to grab Gerard Deulofeu on the top.

The question that arises: Will BVB be weak anyway? An official pain threshold as with Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, in which the club would be willing to negotiate, is not at Dembele anyway.

Pain threshold at 100 million?
The prospect of a three-digit detachment sum would probably bring the bosses Hans-Joachim Watzke and Michael Zorc into the ponder. In Dortmund one is currently disagree, however, whether Dembele so shortly before the start of the season would really be useful.

A sale is currently a matter of weighing, which is influenced by several factors. Will Dembele continue to hang himself, even if the club refuses to change? In the same way as Robert Lewandowski did, when they did not let him go prematurely to FC Bayern in 2013. Or would Dembele be a pouting star?

Should this risk persist, a sale might be the better solution. Then there is the question of competitiveness. Does the BVB with a demo in top form not have much higher chance of a sporty successful season than without him?

With this in mind, Keeper Roman Bürki on Friday, on the sidelines of the team presentation, emphasized: "He is a very important player for us - surely one of the only games can win." We are all glad he is still here and I hope it will Do not change anything. "

Dembele poker is running
For coach Peter Bosz the situation is anything but pleasant. As if he had not already done enough in his first season preparation with the conversion of the team, Dembele's uncertain future now also has another construction site.

On Saturday it will be the first season of the season for the BVB in the Supercup against FC Bayern (8.30 pm in the LIVETICKER). Dembele could be one of the key players.

The problem: With every further gala performance of the French, the likelihood that Barca will find even more pleasure in him and still want to oblige him.

在巴塞球會看來，尼馬在場下行事並沒有在場上踢球時的那種勇敢，在操作離開巴塞的過程中，尼馬父子始終顯得畏畏縮縮，不夠光明磊落。
　　巴塞高層表示，尼馬父子大部分時間都在撒謊、炒作，而他們的這種做法讓巴塞球會以及巴塞球迷感到惱火。幾個月來，尼馬父子一直在為加盟大巴黎做準備，他們利用假期談判與敲定合約，其中包括一份到2022年世界盃的價值3億歐元的贊助合同。
　　巴塞高層認為，尼馬背叛了球會，包括那些在他困難時一直竭盡全力支持和保護他的球會高層。就在6月份，巴塞球會足球主管桑耶伊還參加了尼馬足球學校舉辦的一項活動，而且當時他也絲毫沒有覺察到尼馬要走的意思。一個星期之後，尼馬參加了美斯的婚禮，當時他也沒對巴塞隊友透露任何要走的想法。
　　7月初，巴塞球會在巴西的代表安德雷・庫里向球會報告，尼馬身邊的人有一些怪異的舉動。庫里雖然和尼馬父子關係很好，但這些信息也不是直接從尼馬父子那裡獲得的。巴塞球會也獲得了信息，但球會高層認為和之前的兩個夏天一樣（2015年曼聯想引進尼馬，2016年是大巴黎），對方球會最終會被尼馬超高的合約毀約金嚇退。
　　7月17日，《每日體育報》報導「尼馬在巴塞感覺不舒服」的時候，尼馬事實上兩隻腳都已經進入了大巴黎。艾維斯7月12日加盟大巴黎，而他透露，是尼馬說服他接受了大巴黎的合同。
　　令巴塞高層感到不爽的是，在尼馬和大巴黎已經談妥的情況下，尼馬父子還讓巴塞高層、教練以及隊友們相信，他們有留下的可能性。為此巴塞主席巴爾托梅烏、美斯、比基等人還行動起來，試圖說法尼馬留下。在美國行期間，尼馬甚至還被巴塞球員們說得流下眼淚。
　　《每日體育報》透露，在與美斯交談後，尼馬甚至還表示過會留下，而球會公關部也對媒體通告了這一消息，但最終發現這一切只是一個騙局。在球隊美國行結束之前，巴塞就已經相信無法留住尼馬了。7月31日，尼馬父子還想拿到2600萬歐元的續約獎金，巴塞拒絕了。尼馬父親為此打電話怒罵了巴塞高層。
　　之後尼馬父親在接受媒體採訪時表示，是巴塞不支付這筆續約獎金，讓他們做出了加盟大巴黎的決定。巴塞高層表示，尼馬父親的說法完全是笑話，好像一項涉及4.8億歐元的操作能在兩天內就完成似的。「你就別騙人了！」巴塞高層還擊道。

Borussia Dortmund have said they are "not aware" that Ousmane Dembele has agreed personal terms for a move to Barcelona.

Barca are reported to be interested in signing winger Dembele, 20, as a replacement for Neymar, who joined Paris Saint-Germain for a world-record €222 million last week.

At the weekend, L'Equipe reported that Dembele had agreed personal terms, with Spanish outlet Sport saying on Monday that the Blaugrana are surprised that Dortmund want in excess of €100m for him.

But speaking to reporters at a friendly in Erfurt on Sunday, BVB sporting director Michael Zorc said: "I am not aware of an agreement."

Zorc refused to elaborate further, saying: "It makes no sense to comment on those permanent rumours all the time" but admitting that speculation "will certainly be with us for a while."

On Monday, kicker reported that Dortmund have yet to be officially contacted by Barcelona but could be willing to talk about an offer in excess of €100m.

Dortmund's winter signing Alexander Isak, 17, meanwhile, scored four times as Dortmund's second string beat Erfurt 5-2 on Sunday.

The youngster joined BVB in January, but played only four minutes under former coach Thomas Tuchel and was warned by the Swedish Football Assocation in the summer that he needed to start "rolling at Dortmund."

Isak has already won two caps for Sweden's senior side, but did not make the squad for the European Under-21 Championship this summer.
